title: HLL Graduate / Diploma Apprentice Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
short_info: The latest HLL Lifecare Limited (HLL) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Graduate / Diploma Apprentice posts! Published on the official HLL website, this new recruitment drive offers 4 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants possessing a BE/B.Tech or Diploma in Engineering (Any Stream) who meet the eligibility criteria can apply via email from now until 31 May 2026. Find all details about the HLL Graduate / Diploma Apprentice vacancy 2026, including eligibility, email application, and notification PDF here.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.details: BE/B.Tech/ Diploma in Engineering (Any Stream) Candidates can apply within 05 years from the date of passing the qualifying examination.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 12300/- for Engineering Graduates, Rs. 10900/- for Diploma Holders
salary_details.details: Graduate Apprentice: Rs. 12300/- (Rs. 7800/- by company, Rs. 4500/- by BOAT) Diploma Apprentice: Rs. 10900/- (Rs. 6900/- by company, Rs. 4000/- by BOAT)

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 31-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for HLL Graduate / Diploma Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Graduate / Diploma Apprentice posts at HLL Lifecare Limited is 31st May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a BE/B.Tech or Diploma in Engineering (Any Stream) to be eligible for the Graduate / Diploma Apprentice positions.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for Graduate / Diploma Apprentice posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies announced for the Graduate / Diploma Apprentice positions at HLL Lifecare Limited.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for these apprentice roles?
faq.answer: Engineering Graduates will receive Rs. 12300/- per month, while Diploma Holders will receive Rs. 10900/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply for this recruitment by sending their applications via email.

faq.question: Q6. Where is the HLL Lifecare Limited located for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for the Peroorkada Factory in Trivandrum, Kerala, with the pincode 695005.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Graduate / Diploma Apprentice posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a selection test or an interview, as decided by the organization.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any experience required for the Graduate / Diploma Apprentice positions?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply within 5 years from the date of passing their qualifying examination, indicating no prior experience is mandatory.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these apprentice roles?
faq.answer: These are contract-based positions, offering valuable experience in the healthcare sector.

faq.question: Q10. Who can I contact for further queries regarding the application?
faq.answer: For any queries, it is advisable to refer to the official notification or contact the HR department of HLL Lifecare Limited through the provided email address.
